name: pedift
description: Single-file, offline, privacy-first PDF editor that runs entirely in the browser

scripts.build: node scripts/prebuild-ocr.mjs && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs lean
scripts.build:ocr: node scripts/prebuild-ocr.mjs && tsc --noEmit && PEDIFT_OCR=1 vite build && node scripts/postbuild.mjs ocr
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:ocr
